expected_answer_points: osimertinib is a third-generation EGFR-TKI active against the EGFR T790M resistance mutation
acquired resistance is heterogeneous: MET/HER2 amplification, RAS-MAPK or RAS-PI3K pathway activation, novel fusion events, and histological/phenotypic transformation
FLAURA (NCT02296125) is the first-line trial context for osimertinib
the Tagrisso openFDA label is the regulatory anchor for the regimen
